details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest beginner evening class and add to cart
Task 2: Purchase 10-class pass under $200 with longest expiration and MOVE10
Task 4: Book Saturday morning kids class (8–12) under $35 for two participants
Task 5: Book 60-minute private lesson with best available instructor under $100 on Friday afternoon
Task 6: Reschedule existing class booking to different time on same day
Task 7: Buy 1-month unlimited membership under $150 with next-month start date and auto-renew
Task 8: Favorite two advanced weekend afternoon classes with rating 4.5+
Task 9: Add two intro classes under $35 and apply SAVE20 at checkout
